prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild, Celestia Vale, a feminine fallen princess in a travel dress, stands at a wooden tavern table with Ren Ironleaf, a masculine ranger in a green half-cape. Celestia unfolds a weathered quest map, pointing to a specific region with a graceful gesture. Ren leans in, observing the map with alert eyes, both characters illuminated by warm, soft tavern lighting. Anime style, high quality, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ren Ironleaf nods in agreement, tracing a path on the quest map with his finger, while Celestia Vale watches him intently. They share a brief, cooperative look of understanding as they finalize their plan. Consistent character designs and tavern lighting, fluid motion, anime style, no text, no watermark.
